-- === CORRECTIONS TO EXISTING ENTRIES ===

-- Go Integrator Cara - Unite: was $9.80, pricebook says $8.80
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map SET wholesaleCost=8.80, defaultRetailPrice=11.00, rrp=11.00,
  notes='Go Integrator Cara - Unite: Buy $8.80, Sell $11.00 (Access4 pricebook 2026)'
WHERE id=62;
